race.comment: HEADSTRONG (8) gets back in his races but can put in a big final split. Left with too much to do last time out over this trip in a Class 1 at Eagle Farm. Very fit after three runs back and with 1.5kgs less than last time he looks very well treated. SPICY WINGS (6) missed the top three for the first time in a while at Coffs Harbour last start. Form at the mile is strong and with blinkers on for the first time he is sure to attract plenty of interest. HIGHLAND HUSTLE (11) struggled on a bog track first-up at Coffs Harbour but should improve off that run. Raced here over today's distance once and filled a minor placing. Likely to be thereabouts at the business end. BRAIN WAVE (10) is back after an 11-week lay-off. Best figure last time in work was achieved at this track when a close third over a longer journey. Can play a role with a bit of residual fitness likely. Last start Grafton maiden winner BEEARETEE (2) will handle the going and is a chance to go back-to-back.
